title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's enforcement pivot from Travel Rule guidance to active audits, South Korea's Q4 custody framework deadline, and Indonesia's Q3 OJK custody standards create synchronized compliance infrastructure upgrades across 220+ exchanges, banks, and VASPs representing $180M+ addressable spend through Q4 2026. The "wait and see" window has closed—AUSTRAC audits, BSP enforcement escalation, and FSC consultation deadlines force decision cycles that favored vendors delayed in Phase 1.
